positive: A majestic, stylized portrait of a wise owl perched on a mystical branch. The owl has intensely detailed feathers and enormous, captivating eyes. The background is a gradient blend of deep midnight blue and ethereal emerald green, evoking a magical forest night. The overall aesthetic should be neo-traditional fantasy illustration, emphasizing bold lines, intricate patterns, and high contrast. The composition is centered, making the owl the clear focal point, with strong silhouette elements provided by the surrounding bioluminescent flora (mushrooms, ferns) that glow softly. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette: deep indigo, forest green, touches of gold metallic sheen, and stark white highlights. The style must be clean, vector-art quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel, with sharp edges and defined areas of color.
negative: blurry, grainy, watermark, text, signature, artifacts, low quality, bad anatomy, noisy, bokeh, messy, messy lines, logos, trademarks, cropped, distorted, multiple subjects, excess limbs, disfigured, extra digits
